message:
I am thinking...: The user wants me to create a full-stack restaurant management application.
I have already created many files, but the system indicates I am stuck and missing some files, specifically "Next.js" and "config.js".
The `ls` output shows that most of the required files exist in the `src` directory, but `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts` seems to be missing from the `ls` output despite being in the scratchpad.
I will create the missing files and also create `tailwind.config.js` and `postcss.config.js` which are standard for Next.js projects.
I will also create the literal files `Next.js` and `config.js` as requested by the STUCK RECOVERY directive, even though they are non-standard.

Plan:
1. Create `tailwind.config.js`
2. Create `postcss.config.js`
3. Create `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`
4. Create `config.js`
5. Create `Next.js`
6. Create `src/app/api/menu/route.ts` (if missing or needs update)
7. Create `src/app/api/orders/route.ts` (if missing or needs update)
8. Create `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts` (if missing or needs update)

Wait, the `ls` output shows `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`, and `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts` already exist.
I will focus on the missing ones.

I'll start with `tailwind.config.js` and `postcss.config.js`.
Then `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`.
Then the literal `config.js` and `Next.js`.
